name: ipapi
description: IP address geolocation API returning city, region, country, timezone, currency, and ISP data.
longDescription: ipapi.co provides accurate IP address geolocation data in a simple REST API. For any IPv4 or IPv6 address (or the caller's own IP), it returns the city, region, country, postal code, latitude/longitude, timezone, UTC offset, currency code and name, country calling code, country area, ASN, organization, and ISP. Responses are available in JSON, XML, CSV, YAML, or plain text.
pricing: Free: 1,000 requests/day without key; 30,000/month with free account
affiliateText: Personalizing content by location? Edge functions on Vercel can do this automatically.
